text.title: Knowledge Sharing Ritual Set Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Knowledge Sharing Ritual Set output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: ritual_calendar populated with a typed value
artefact_policy populated with a typed value
recording_and_async populated with a typed value
newcomer_question_counter populated with a typed value
quarterly_review_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
